name: httpx
description: Imports HTTP probe results from ProjectDiscovery httpx (https://github.com/projectdiscovery/httpx). Each probed host becomes an ASSET (hostname + resolved IP), each live URL a SERVICE, and detected technologies are recorded as CPE-like components. Offline mode: parse an httpx JSON-lines output (`httpx -json`). Live mode: if `target` is set and the `httpx` binary is on the worker PATH, runs `httpx -json -silent` against it. Run live only within an authorised engagement scope. No DB access in run.py (worker-safe).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to an httpx JSON-lines output file (`httpx -json`) to import.

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Live mode: a host/URL (or path to a hosts file) to probe with the local `httpx` binary.
